_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Participate in Boards, Bureaus, Cells, Centers, and Working Groups (B2C2WGs).
reference_document_element_description: Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-009 (LS, cosine: 0.412), DG-T-009 (DG, cosine: 0.406).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.359). Shared vocabulary: [participate]. DCWF-only terms [b2c2wgs, boards, bureaus, cells, centers, groups] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, channels, community, council, data, domain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.822 (P=0.798, R=0.847). R exceeds P by 0.049 — the WIDAI KSA's 21 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 10 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Participate in Boards, Bureaus, Cells, Centers, and Working Groups (B2C2WGs)." and "Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.450 > STS 0.359 (gap +0.091). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [participate] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [participate]. DCWF-only: [b2c2wgs, boards, bureaus, cells, centers, groups]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, channels, community, council, data, domain].
